issues.detail: Instructions lack coverage of error scenarios and edge cases.

scenarios.name: Recommend a GTM motion for a remote-design-team PM tool with motion contrast
scenarios.rationale: Baseline picks a motion intuitively with vague metrics; treatment applies the documented requirements checklist, names PLG's Signup→Activation→Conversion metrics, and contrasts SLG and CLG using documented criteria.

scenarios.name: 6-week launch campaign for a B2B analytics platform across three phases
scenarios.rationale: Baseline lists tactics without time-boxed phases; treatment maps pre-launch deliverables (waitlist, 5-10 design partners, 90s demo, load testing), the documented launch-day sequence, and post-launch activation/source-attribution metrics.
